mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) OVER() totalCnt ,m.user_id ,m.user_nm ,m.user_pwd ,m.user_typ_fg_cd ,m.user_co_fg_cd ,c.cd_nm as userCoFgNm ,m.user_email_addr ,m.user_bf_pwd ,m.user_pwd_last_upd_date ,m.del_yn ,m.use_yn ,NVL(TRUNC(SYSDATE - m.user_login_last_date),0) user_login_last_date ,m.user_login_last_date userLoginLastDay ,m.user_id_lock_yn ,m.login_fail_cnt ,decode(m.join_aprv_sts_cd,1,'사용',2,'중지',3,'잠김',4,'승인대기') join_aprv_sts_cd ,to_char(m.stm_fir_reg_date,'yyyy.MM.dd') stm_fir_reg_date ,m2.user_nm stm_fir_reg_user_id
FROM ad_user_mst m , ad_comm_cd c , ad_user_mst m2 WHERE m.user_co_fg_cd = c.comm_cd AND c.comm_grp_cd = 'USER_CO_FG_CD' AND m.del_yn != 'Y' AND m.user_id = m2.stm_fir_reg_user_id(+)
AND UPPER(m.user_id) = UPPER(#{userId})
AND UPPER(m.user_nm) = UPPER(#{userNm})
AND m.join_aprv_sts_cd = #{useYn}
ORDER BY m.stm_last_upd_date desc
SELECT count(*) OVER() totalCnt ,uam.user_id ,uam.autr_id FROM ad_user_mst um ,ad_user_autr_map uam WHERE um.user_id = uam.user_id AND um.user_id = #{userId}
